plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.si coché la ligne de temps sera affiché: If checked, the timeline will be displayed vertically
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.*** ATTENTION 1: positionner les courbes: *** NOTE 1: Position the curves so they are stacked one on top of the other; otherwise, it will not work.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.*** ATTENTION 2: si les données des cour: *** NOTE 2: If the data in the graphs is not grouped by the same time interval (see below), then this will not work either
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.- **Automatique** : s'adapte selon le no: - **Automatic**: Adjusts based on the number of charts. Full width for 1 chart, stacked vertically for 2, 2 small charts at the top and 1 taking up the space at the bottom for 3, and 2x2 for 4.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.- `1 grand en haut + 2 petits en bas`: - `1 large one on top + 2 small ones on the bottom`
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.- `2 petits en haut + 1 grand en bas`: - `2 small ones upstairs + 1 large one downstairs`
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.- `3 graphiques de taille identique → 2: - `3 charts of the same size → 2 at the top, 1 centered at the bottom`
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.1 grand en haut + 2 petits en bas: 1 large one on top + 2 small ones on the bottom
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.2 petits en haut + 1 grand en bas: 2 small ones upstairs + 1 large one downstairs
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.3 graphiques → 2 en haut, 1 en bas centr: 3 charts → 2 at the top, 1 centered at the bottom
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Affichage des données : permet de faire: Data display: allows you to group data by time intervals (minute, hour, etc.) and apply an operation to them (average, sum, etc.)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Affiche des options si 'ligne de temps': Displays options if 'timeline' is selected under 'chart type'
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Afficher l'axe Y (valeurs) : afficher ou: Show Y-axis (values): whether or not to display the value axis (usually vertical)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Afficher la barre de navigation, de défi: Show the navigation bar, scroll bar, or buttons: see the help by clicking the button
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Afficher: affiche ou non la courbe: Display: shows or hides the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Alterner axe Y gauche\/droite :: Switch between left and right on the Y-axis:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Alterner axe Y gauche\/droite : si plusi: Toggle left/right Y-axis: if multiple units are used, this allows you to toggle between the left and right Y-axes for each curve
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Angle selon un axe horizontal de 0 à 360: Angle along a horizontal axis from 0 to 360
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Angle selon un axe vertical de 0 à 360: Angle along a vertical axis from 0 to 360
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Applique la couleur par défaut de Highch: Applies the default Highcharts color; uncheck to select the colors you want
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Attention: si cette option est sélection: Note: If this option is selected, the navigation and scroll bars will not be displayed.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Au chargement du graphique limiter la pé: When loading the graph, limit the displayed period to:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Aucun équipement jeeHistoGraph trouvé, c: No jeeHistoGraph devices found. Click "Add" to get started.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Cochez pour afficher la courbe dans le g: Check this box to display the curve in the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Coefficient: permet d'appliquer un coeff: Coefficient: allows you to apply a coefficient to the command values to convert from one unit to another. Negative coefficients can be applied
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Commande: sélectionner ici la commande q: Command: Select the command here that will be used to feed the curve data
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Comparaison temporelle : permet de compa: Time comparison: allows you to compare year-over-year data—either for the entire year or for a specific month—for a command with several years of records
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Couleur : permet de choisir la couleur p: Color: allows you to choose a color for each curve
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Courbe en escalier, ne fonctionne pas av: Stepped curve; does not work with all types of curves
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Courbe à inclure dans l'empilement après: Curve to include in the stack after selecting the type
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Disposition des graphiques: choisir la d: Chart layout: Choose the chart layout based on the number
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Distance entre le point de vue et le gra: Distance between the viewpoint and the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Définit la période affichée par défaut s: Sets the default time period displayed on the charts. Can be changed dynamically via the menu for each chart.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Définit un seuil d'attention (ligne hori: Sets an alert threshold (fixed horizontal line)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Empilement: permet de positionner les co: Stacking: allows you to position the curves one on top of the other. First, select the desired stacking type (normal or in %), then check the boxes
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.En cas d'utilisation de l'affichage du g: When using the "hover" chart display in a design:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Esc.: affiche graphiquement la courbe en: Esc.: graphically displays the staircase curve for the transition from one value to the next
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Fond transparent : si déselectionné perm: Transparent background: if deselected, allows you to choose a background color for the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Gestion comparaisons par période pour un: Managing comparisons by time period for the same command:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Gestion des comparaisons par période pou: Managing comparisons by time period for the same command
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Lors d'un update des courbes, ajouter le: When updating the curves, add the new data to the graph:
When updating the curves, add the new data to the graph:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.N'a aucun effet si l'affichage des donné: Has no effect if the data display is set to 'All'
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Nom de la courbe dans le graphique, lais: Name of the curve in the graph; leave blank to use the command name
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Nombre de datas limité à 300 mais peut ê: Data limit set at 300, but may be reduced if performance slows down
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Opération à appliquer : appliquer une op: Operation to apply: Apply an operation (average, sum, etc.) to the data for which the "Data display" option is not set to "All"
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permet d'afficher une période limitée au: Allows you to display a limited time period when loading the chart, even if the display period is longer.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permet de choisir la couleur de la courb: Allows you to choose the color of the curve
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permet de fixer les dimensions du graphi: Allows you to set the dimensions of the hover graphic. If either parameter is set to 0, the graphic will take on the width specified in the design. Useful if you want to set a small hover area and a larger graphic
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permet de passer rapidement à une périod: Allows you to quickly switch to a predefined time period (1 day, 1 second, 1 minute, etc.)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permet de se déplacer horizontalement da: Allows you to move horizontally through time
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permettre zoom par souris axe des x :: Enable zooming using the mouse on the x-axis:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Permettre zoom par souris axe des y :: Enable zooming along the Y-axis using the mouse:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Personnalisation uniquement pour design: Customization  only for hover display design:
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Pour remettre la couleur par défaut sais: To restore the default color, enter 100 100 100
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Période d'affichage : applique la périod: Display period: applies the period of the parameter selected on the "Equipment" page or customizes it for this graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.RAZ couleurs courbes : permet de remettr: Reset curve colors: resets all curve colors to their default values
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Remet les couleurs des courbes de ce gra: Resets the colors of the curves in this graph to the plugin's default colors and unchecks the default checkbox if necessary
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Reporter les crosshairs : reporter les l: Show crosshairs: display the lines that follow the mouse pointer on the selected charts. The reverse is also true
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Référence à la valeur précédente dans l': Reference to the previous value in the tooltip
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Seuil: permet de définir un seuil d'atte: Threshold: allows you to set an alert threshold (fixed horizontal line, will be the same color as the curve)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si coché alors va apparaitre dans l'info: If checked, the following will appear in the tooltip: 'previous value' → 'current value' + date; otherwise, only the date
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si coché les axes Y ne portant pas les m: If checked, Y-axes with different units will alternate between left and right
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si coché, le graphique se raffraichit lo: If checked, the graph refreshes when it becomes visible again. Note: if checked, the zoom levels are reset to 0. When a graph is not visible, updates do not occur; you must refresh it either manually or automatically.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si coché, les courbes des graphiques s'a: If checked, the graphs will update automatically when new data becomes available.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si décoché l'infobulle n'apparaitra plus: If unchecked, the tooltip will no longer appear when you hover over an item
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Si décoché seuls les labels qui ne se ch: If unchecked, only labels that do not overlap will be displayed; if checked, all labels will appear and will overlap if there is not enough space
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Type d'infobulle: permet de définir la f: Tooltip type: allows you to define whether or not tooltips will be displayed
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Type de courbe : permet de choisir indiv: Curve type: allows you to select a specific curve type or apply the graph's global setting. Not all types can be mixed.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Type de courbe par défaut (ci-dessous) o: Default curve type (below) or by curve
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Unité : permet d'ajouter une unité si la: Unit: allows you to add a unit if the command does not have one, or to convert the unit based on the conversion factor (e.g., converting from W to kW)
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Var.: affiche graphiquement la courbe en: Var.: graphically displays the variation curve (delta) from one value to the next.
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.Vue miniature du graphique complet – per: Thumbnail view of the full graph – zoom in by dragging the gray handles
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.afficher ou non ces infos sur votre grap: Show or hide this information on your chart
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.ce sera le mois qui se situera le plus à: this will be the month furthest to the right on the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.choisir l'emplacement du titre sur le gr: Choose where to place the title on the graph
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.choisir le nombre de graphique voulu à a: Select the number of graphs you want to display, from 1 to 4
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.choisir le type de courbe voulue (ligne,: Select the desired curve type (line, area, etc.). Applies to all curves in the graph that do not have a type selected individually
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.courbe: information purement indicative: curve: purely indicative information providing the curve number
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.facultatif, donner un nom à votre graphi: Optional: Give your chart a name
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.fixer la taille de la zone d'affichage d: Set the size of the device display area without changing the initial display size
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.libellé: nom donné à la courbe: label: name given to the curve
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.permet de définir l'ordre d'affichage de: allows you to set the order in which the curves are displayed on the graph. Note: if two curves have the same number, the second one will be displayed last
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.permet de remettre le fond de tous les g: allows you to reset the background of all transparent charts with a single click
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.reporter les lignes verticales et horizo: Draw vertical and horizontal lines that follow the mouse position across all selected charts
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.si coché, les courbes des graphiques s'a: If checked, the graphs will update automatically when new data becomes available
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.une fois le zoom réalisé on peut navigue: Once you've zoomed in, you can navigate the graph by holding down the Shift key and clicking the left mouse button
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.une infobulle par courbe par date commun: one tooltip per curve per common date
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.À quoi correspondent ces options de navi: What do these navigation options correspond to?
plugins\/jeeHistoGraph\/desktop\/php\/je.À quoi correspondent les options de navi: What do the navigation options correspond to?
